accepted_candidates.label: AI Security Questionnaire Copilot
accepted_candidates.description: Helps teams answer repeated security questionnaires with reusable evidence, control mapping, and answer updates.
accepted_candidates.specialization_surface: security answer drafting, evidence retrieval, and procurement response packaging
accepted_candidates.mastery_surface: improving repeated questionnaire response accuracy and speed
accepted_candidates.user_value_loop: retrieve prior answers, update evidence, submit questionnaire, learn from follow-up requests
accepted_candidates.evidence_summary: Repeated enterprise sales friction appears around security review loops, especially where answers must be maintained across deals.
accepted_candidates.raw_observation: This is a repeated enterprise response loop with its own evidence surface.
classification_reasons: Has domain shape, specialization surface, mastery surface, and evidence summary.

accepted_candidates.label: AI RFP Response Copilot
accepted_candidates.description: Helps B2B teams assemble, tailor, and learn from repeated RFP and security questionnaire responses.
accepted_candidates.specialization_surface: response drafting, knowledge retrieval, and enterprise packaging
accepted_candidates.mastery_surface: improving repeated enterprise response accuracy and speed
accepted_candidates.user_value_loop: retrieve evidence, draft response, submit package, learn from procurement feedback
accepted_candidates.evidence_summary: Repeated demand appears around high-friction enterprise response loops, especially where teams reuse prior answers.
accepted_candidates.raw_observation: This is a recurring enterprise operating loop rather than one-off document generation.
classification_reasons: Has domain shape, specialization surface, mastery surface, and evidence summary.

narrowing_note: Subset of the focused enterprise-response batch for enterprise-only benchmark review.
